SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-24-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-24-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER LUBIA PEREZ.
